problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
